industries.name: Hotels & Resorts
industries.description: Hotels consume massive volumes of domestic hot water for guest rooms, kitchens, laundry, and pool heating. Karnot R290 heat pumps replace diesel boilers, cutting energy costs by up to 78% while delivering 55-65°C hot water 24/7.

industries.name: Commercial Laundries
industries.description: Industrial laundering requires consistent 60-80°C hot water at high volumes. Karnot heat pumps provide reliable supply at a fraction of gas or diesel boiler running costs, with zero on-site emissions.

industries.name: Pharmaceuticals & Laboratories
industries.description: Pharmaceutical manufacturing demands precise temperature control for process heating, CIP cleaning, lab water, and ultra-cold storage. Karnot natural refrigerant systems cover the full spectrum from -130°C cryogenics to +80°C process heat.

industries.name: Food Processing
industries.description: Food processors need hot water for washing, blanching, and CIP systems, plus cold storage and blast freezing. Karnot provides both heating and cooling from natural refrigerant systems with heat recovery.

industries.name: Swimming Pools & Gyms
industries.description: Pool temperature control systems maintain optimal water temperature year-round — heating in cooler months and preventing overheating in tropical summer. iSPA inverter systems achieve COP up to 15.04.

industries.name: Hospitals & Healthcare
industries.description: Hospitals require 24/7 hot water for sterilization, patient care, and infection control. Karnot R290 heat pumps deliver reliable 55-80°C water with redundant cascade configurations for zero downtime.

industries.name: Brewing & Distilling
industries.description: Breweries need mash heating, wort cooling, fermentation temperature control, and CIP cleaning across a wide temperature range. Karnot systems provide simultaneous heating and cooling with heat recovery.

industries.name: Cold Storage & Warehousing
industries.description: Commercial freezing and chilled storage with natural refrigerant CO₂ systems. Future-proof against HFC phase-downs while reducing energy costs by up to 60%.

industries.name: Bottling Plants
industries.description: Bottling operations require high-volume CIP wash water and bottle rinsing at 60-80°C, plus process cooling. Karnot heat pumps meet both needs with simultaneous heating and cooling modes.

industries.name: Data Centres
industries.description: Data centre cooling represents 30-40% of total energy use. Karnot CO₂ cooling with waste heat recovery can pre-heat domestic water while maintaining optimal server temperatures.

industries.name: Plastic Recycling
industries.description: Recycling plastics requires process heat for washing, drying, and pelletizing at 60-90°C. Karnot R290 heat pumps provide consistent temperatures at a fraction of fossil fuel costs.

industries.name: Agriculture & Livestock
industries.description: Climate-controlled growing, livestock heating, and the HydroGreen NearFarm vertical pasture system for year-round fodder production in tropical climates.

painPoints.name: High Hot Water Costs
painPoints.description: Reduce commercial hot water heating costs by 60-78% compared to diesel, gas, or electric boilers.

painPoints.name: Diesel Boiler Replacement
painPoints.description: Eliminate diesel procurement, storage, and price volatility with heat pump technology.

painPoints.name: Carbon Emission Reduction
painPoints.description: Cut scope 1 and 2 emissions with natural refrigerant systems achieving near-zero direct GWP.

painPoints.name: Steam Boiler Replacement
painPoints.description: Replace inefficient steam systems with high-temperature R290 or CO₂ heat pumps.

painPoints.name: Cold Storage Efficiency
painPoints.description: Future-proof refrigeration with natural CO₂ systems ahead of HFC phase-downs.

painPoints.name: Precision Temperature Control
painPoints.description: Maintain exact process temperatures from -130°C to +80°C with inverter-driven systems.

painPoints.name: HFC Phase-Down Compliance
painPoints.description: Stay ahead of Kigali Amendment and AIM Act regulations with natural refrigerant systems.

painPoints.name: Pool Temperature Control
painPoints.description: Maintain optimal pool temperature year-round with inverter heat pump technology.

painPoints.name: Industrial Process Heat
painPoints.description: Replace gas-fired process heating with efficient heat pump solutions up to 80°C.

painPoints.name: Energy-Intensive Operations
painPoints.description: Reduce energy consumption in high-demand applications with COP 4.0-5.0 heat pumps.
